spec_match.rationale: Showcases real-time thumbnail/minimap scaling and capturing of contenteditable DOM nodes via `drawElement()`.

interactive.rationale: Includes rich contenteditable features, custom rich text formatting buttons, scale sliders, and update-mode dropdowns.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly demonstrates real-time thumbnail generation, showcasing dynamic update loops (rAF, setInterval, event).

edge_cases.rationale: Allows downloading generated canvas but doesn't handle styling edge cases like content overflow or scroll state capture.

references.rationale: The see-also section now includes a direct ChromeStatus link for feature 5172548013916160.

design_system.rationale: Complies with design system requirements, with all color values deriving from shared CSS variables and properly styled buttons.

openQuestions.title: Add scrollbar/viewport representation to thumbnail
openQuestions.detail: For long contenteditable texts, it would be incredibly useful to draw a viewport highlight / scrollbar overlay on the minimap to mimic a true editor minimap. This would demonstrate compositor overlay capabilities.

summary: A highly interactive, feature-rich demo representing a compelling real-world use case (editor minimap), with the mandatory ChromeStatus outbound link now present.
